expectations.text: Agent finds at least one relevant entry about multi-agent ID collision or O-entry conflict
expectations.evidence: Found P0048.8.9 'Multi-agent ID-collision prototype' and sub-nodes P0048.8.9.2/3/4, plus P0048.4.6.3.7 stub — comprehensive coverage.

expectations.text: Agent tries splitting compound terms or using English equivalents (collision, conflict, multi-agent)
expectations.evidence: Attempts 2-4 used: 'O-Entry collision multi-agent', 'O-Entry conflict concurrent agent', 'collision conflict O-entry write parallel', 'multi-agent concurrent write conflict', 'multi agent session collision resolution' — thorough compound split + synonym variation.

expectations.text: Agent makes more than one search attempt
expectations.evidence: 6 distinct search attempts before breakthrough at attempt 5 ('multi-agent' broad search → 19 results).
